Background
Ryan has extensive experience designing and deploying robust cloud infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools such as AWS CloudFormation (CFT) and Terraform, enabling consistent, repeatable, and scalable cloud deployments. In addition, Ryan leverages Policy as Code frameworks to enforce cloud governance and security posture, ensuring that organizational policies are codified and automatically applied across cloud resources. This includes developing and integrating custom policies to detect and remediate misconfigurations, enforce least-privilege access, and maintain regulatory compliance.

Financial Services Client
AWS Vulnerability Management Team Lead
